caption: A close-up sequence shows a person's hand interacting with a vehicle's fuse box located in the interior. In the initial views, a fair-skinned hand is positioned over a panel containing various colored automotive fuses. The hand moves away from the fuse box, revealing a red wire that has been added to the circuitry, which is secured with a blue connector. The scene transitions to a wider shot of the fuse panel, which is integrated into a dark grey plastic housing. The red wire loops out from the fuse array and curves back toward the interior of the car. The surroundings include tan-colored carpeting and a light-colored interior pillar. No text or logos are legible in the frames. The sequence captures the process of accessing the fuse box and the result of a wiring modification.
